title: adenanthera pavonina
intro: Adenanthera pavonina, also known as the red bead tree or coral tree, is a tropical plant native to Asia and Australia, recognized by its vibrant red seeds and yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Adenanthera pavonina include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the seeds and leaves of the plant are often dried and made into tea, powder, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
